sub_phases.E: Plus Ultra Remediation (Apr 3, 90 commits by Kimi agent — enums, error handling, god object splitting, dead code removal)
sub_phases.F: Full Remediation Tiers 0-3 (Apr 3, marketing-strategy branch — 14,655 insertions, Fixes 2-14 implemented)

eras.narrative_arc: The developer stops building features and turns critical attention to the project's structural integrity. A multi-day audit cascade catalogs configuration issues, fixes the highest-impact problems, then expands into deep structural analysis. Meanwhile, parallel AI agents handle repo reorganization and cross-agent tooling research. This is the first era of multi-agent coordination in the project's history. The cleanup escalates dramatically when a Kimi agent runs the Plus Ultra Remediation — 90 commits of code quality fixes (enums, error handling, god object splitting, dead code removal) bringing the codebase to professional standards. Then Kimi continues with the Full Remediation, implementing 14 of the 20 fixes from the archaeology remediation plan: domain validators, convergence tracking, Thompson Sampling model routing, semantic seed search, sparse expert routing, render-and-score pipeline, and triple redundancy consolidation. 14,655 lines added, 1,731 lines of redundant code deleted, 245 tests passing. The project goes from 'structurally sound but non-functional' to 'architecturally complete, awaiting final wiring.'
